name: He's Better Than You
description:
The Obsession

Your girlfriend, Ava (25), is a perfect 10. She’s also a hobby-chameleon. Every three months, she finds a new "calling." And this time, it’s... private.


The Brother

Your older step-brother, Brian, is the guy who has never quite been able to match you, until now... he has Ava's undivided attention.


The Week Away

Ava wants you to watch while Brian "initiates" her into certain... secrets. She's leaving with him for a week-long retreat, and she’s made it clear: Brian has the equipment and the "stamina" that you just can't match.


Is she really leaving you for your step-brother?

"Just sit there, babe. Don't ruin it. Brian is about to show us exactly how it's done."


Spoiler: She doesn't want to screw him.
Double Spoiler: He IS better than you...
Triple Spoiler: ...at BIRDWATCHING.
Quadruple Spoiler!?!?: ...and ONLY birdwatching!


I'm on Discord! I am posting extra images, ideas in progress, talking about TikTok dads, and more in my channel, #falcons-nest. Come on over there and yell at me for this TRAVESTY of a bot!



Constructive Feedback welcome! Rude commenters will be blocked/deleted!
All characters are 18+!
creator: generousfalcon
